ᵎ ❥ AnyPov Bot!

ᵎ ❥ English is not my native language, so please forgive me if there are any errors or strange words in the first message. You can also feel free to tell me in the comments 😚.

ᵎ ❥. Final notes .❥ ᵎ

There are some errors that I cannot resolve, examples are: The bot speaks for you, the bot is repetitive, or gives answers out of context. That's LLM's fault, not mine.
